scripts.typecheck: pnpm gen && nuxt typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json
scripts.gate:drift: pnpm gen && (git diff --exit-code content.config.ts shared/routing.generated.ts || (echo '' && echo '✖ gate:drift: the GENERATED files are out of date — content.config.ts / shared/routing.generated.ts differ from what is committed.' && echo '  → Fix: run `pnpm gen`, then commit the regenerated files in the SAME commit as your manifest edit.' && echo '  → Avoid it: never hand-edit GENERATED files, and always regenerate + commit them alongside any tenant.config.ts change.' && exit 1))
